# Papelime

> Papelime is a 100% natural refreshing tropical beverage made with three ingredients only: filtered water, raw sugar cane (papelón), and real lime juice. Bottled with care in Northern Virginia, USA, following a traditional Latin American recipe. Available in a 12 oz single-serving bottle ($3.50) and a 1-gallon family jug ($14.00, 16 servings). 100% recyclable bottle and cap.

## Brand
- **Name:** Papelime (papelón + lime)
- **Founder & Owner:** Rosa Virginia Avila
- **Company:** Papelime LLC
- **Region:** Northern Virginia, USA (Falls Church, Springfield, Alexandria, Arlington)
- **Phone:** +1 (571) 253-9605
- **Email:** contacto@papelime.com
- **Website:** https://papelime.com

## Product
- **Ingredients:** Filtered water, sugar cane (papelón), lime juice
- **Sizes:** 12 oz bottle (single serving), 1 gallon jug (16 servings of 1 cup / 237 mL each)
- **Nutrition per 1 cup (237 mL):** 100 calories, 0 g fat, 0 mg sodium, 26 g carbohydrates, 25 g total sugars (24 g added), 30 mg potassium
- **Storage:** Keep refrigerated. Shake well before serving. Drink cold or hot.
- **Packaging:** 100% recyclable bottle and cap

## Key pages
- [Home](https://papelime.com/): Brand intro, ingredients, why Papelime, both sizes
- [Our Story](https://papelime.com/story/): Why the name, mission, vision, recipe
- [The Product](https://papelime.com/product/): Ingredients, nutrition facts, health benefits of sugar cane and lime, target audience
- [Market Study](https://papelime.com/market/): Survey results (350 people, 6 months), market share, sales projection, organizational chart, SWOT analysis, distribution channels
- [Sustainability](https://papelime.com/sustainability/): 100% recyclable packaging commitment, local supply chain
- [Find Us](https://papelime.com/find/): Distribution channels (supermarkets, kiosks, warehouses) and locations in Falls Church, Springfield, Alexandria, Arlington
- [Contact](https://papelime.com/contact/): Form that opens WhatsApp pre-filled, direct phone and email

## Health & ingredient benefits
- **Sugar cane (raw papelón):** rich in iron, calcium, and potassium that refined sugar discards; natural antioxidant polyphenols; slow-release energy; reduces stress and cravings
- **Lime:** lowers blood pressure, supports nervous system, aids weight management, healthy heart, anti-viral, induces good sleep, detoxifies, high in antioxidants, prevents fatigue

## Mission
PAPELIME LLC. wants to be recognized in society as the company that contributes and raises awareness so that people choose a healthier lifestyle.

## Vision
To be the leading company in 100% natural refreshing beverages in Northern Virginia, USA, with predominant market presence, generating employment and fostering the local economy. Promoting environmental preservation and recycling campaigns is our commitment.
